name: vscode-worktrees
description: Make the Explorer follow the active terminal's git worktree in a multi-root workspace.

commands.title: Worktrees: Add Git Worktrees as Workspace Folders

worktrees.follow.enabled.description: Reveal the active terminal's workspace folder in the Explorer when switching terminals or changing directories.

worktrees.follow.collapseOthers.description: Collapse all Explorer folders before revealing the active terminal's folder.

worktrees.follow.restoreTerminalFocus.description: Return focus to the terminal after revealing the folder in the Explorer.

worktrees.follow.pollIntervalMs.description: How often (ms) to check the active terminal's directory, as a fallback for terminal switches that VS Code does not report via events. 0 disables polling; positive values are clamped to at least 500. Takes effect after restarting the extension host.
